name: Mate Bonded
description: From bonding with Kaia, you gained 1 spirit and an extra 15% virility, 3 technique and 1 willpower from your increased awareness! In addition your body is able to process all aphrodisiacs much more effectively, lowering their potency by 2 every turn and reducing damage taken from aphrodisiacs by 10%. However the bonding process has left your dick 10% more sensitive, your body 50% more susceptible to aphrodisiac effects, and increased your monstrous fetish by 10.
